response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics for 'High-Touch☆Memory', with some sections using specialized 'Summer ver.' lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the main lyrics; manual transcription was used for specific 'Summer ver.' ad-libs ('Happy image', 'Fancy magic') and the varied verse structure in the first half of the video. 3. Timing & Pacing: Normal performance pacing; timing is strictly anchored to vocalizations with instantaneous transitions during continuous lines to ensure synchronization.

subtitles.original: こんなDay by dayがいい

subtitles.english: Because it doesn't change, always Only you

subtitles.original: だからほら うだうだしてる場合じゃないの
subtitles.english: So look, it's no time to be idle

subtitles.original: 掴めハッピーエンディング
subtitles.english: Grasp the happy ending

subtitles.original: いつまでも隣で笑っていたいのよ
subtitles.english: I want to be laughing by your side forever

subtitles.original: いつも仲間はずれで 独りぼっちの毎日
subtitles.english: Always an outcast, lonely every day

subtitles.original: そんな私の前に 現れた君は
subtitles.english: You who appeared before such a me

subtitles.original: 同じ淋しさを 抱えている
subtitles.english: Are carrying the same loneliness

subtitles.original: とても とても 優しい人
subtitles.english: A very, very kind person

subtitles.original: 今も心配事は多いけど
subtitles.english: There are still many worries now, but...

subtitles.original: もう私も君も 一人じゃない
subtitles.english: Already, neither I nor you are alone

subtitles.original: 騒がしくて愛おしい この日々が
subtitles.english: These noisy and lovely days

subtitles.original: ずっと 続きますように
subtitles.english: May they continue forever

subtitles.original: 飛ばせ Happy なイメージ
subtitles.english: Fly, a happy image

subtitles.original: とびきりの Fancy なマジック
subtitles.english: The best fancy magic

subtitles.original: また君に くどくど言われそうだけど
subtitles.english: I might be nagged by you again, but...

subtitles.original: そんな Day by day がいい

subtitles.english: Since that day, Falling in love with you

subtitles.original: そしてまた今日もハプニング 明日はどんな

subtitles.original: おかしなことが起こるかな

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ☆メモリー (LIVE High-Touch Summer ver.)
subtitles.english: [Title: High-Touch☆Memory (LIVE High-Touch Summer ver.)]

subtitles.original: いっせーので 君とだけ！
subtitles.english: One, two, only with you!

subtitles.original: もう少し眠りたいけど
subtitles.english: I want to sleep a little more, but...

subtitles.original: もったいないよ 今日は Sunday
subtitles.english: It's a waste, today is Sunday

subtitles.original: 楽しいこと やりたいこと Wake up! 始めようよ
subtitles.english: Fun things, things I want to do. Wake up! Let's start

subtitles.original: めくりめく季節 君と 次のステージへ
subtitles.english: Changing seasons with you, to the next stage

subtitles.original: 声を合わせ 扉開けて 駆け出せ迷わずに
subtitles.english: Join our voices, open the door, run out without hesitating

subtitles.original: 転んでも かっこわるくてもイイじゃない
subtitles.english: Even if I fall, even if it's not cool, it's fine

subtitles.original: Stand up! イメージ もっと 重ねて行くその先で
subtitles.english: Stand up! Layer more images, and beyond that...

subtitles.original: いっせーので 君とだけ！
subtitles.english: One, two, only with you!

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手たたいて 奏でるメロディーを
subtitles.english: High-five, clap hands, the melody we play...

subtitles.original: 合図に走り出せ Go! 君とならこわくない
subtitles.english: Start running at the signal, Go! With you I'm not afraid

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手と手叩いて 重ねるそのメモリーは
subtitles.english: High-five, clap hand to hand, those memories we stack...

subtitles.original: 明日へのエネルギー Yeah! さあ行こうよもっと先へ
subtitles.english: Energy for tomorrow. Yeah! Let's go further ahead

subtitles.original: 君となら Happy Lucky Life! (ハピラキラ)
subtitles.english: With you, Happy Lucky Life!

subtitles.original: あの日見た夢の続き 追いつくその日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day I catch up to the continuation of the dream I saw that day

subtitles.original: 涙なんて振り切るくらい もっとスピードアップ
subtitles.english: Speed up more, enough to shake off the tears

subtitles.original: どんな未来になっても 後悔しないよ
subtitles.english: No matter what future it becomes, I won't regret it

subtitles.original: 自分自身 選んだ道 踏み出せ迷わずに
subtitles.english: The path I chose myself, step out without hesitating

subtitles.original: 落ち込んで 進めなくなった時は
subtitles.english: When you are down and can't move forward,

subtitles.original: Wake up! 思い返す 夢見た頃の記憶を
subtitles.english: Wake up! Look back on the memories of the time you dreamed

subtitles.original: 手と手で 奏でる 叶える 煌めく 夢を 君とだけ！
subtitles.english: Hand in hand, play, fulfill, sparkling dream, only with you!

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ その度に 繋がっていく心
subtitles.english: High-five, every time, our hearts connect

subtitles.original: 一人じゃないことを そう 気付かせてくれたよね
subtitles.english: I realized I'm not alone, didn't I?

subtitles.original: ハイタッチ 手と手叩いて 奏でるそのメロディーが
subtitles.english: High-five, clap hand to hand, the melody you play...

subtitles.original: 世界に届くまで Yeah! この夢は続いてく
subtitles.english: ...until it reaches the world. Yeah! This dream continues

subtitles.original: 君となら Happy Lucky Live! (ハピラキラ)
subtitles.english: With you, Happy Lucky Live!

subtitles.original: くじいて歩けない日は おんぶしてあげる君を
subtitles.english: On days when I'm discouraged and can't walk, I'll carry you on my back

subtitles.original: ほら見てそっちの方が 強く地面 踏み込める
subtitles.english: Look, this way I can step on the ground more strongly
